dtx_name: companion patella powered by medi - proved by Dt. Kniegesellschaft

studies.dtx_name: companion patella powered by medi - proved by Dt. Kniegesellschaft
studies.risk_class: Risk Class I according to MDR
studies.duration_additional_info: The intervention consists of a 90-day personalized exercise therapy, with outcomes measured at days 0, 30, 60, and 90.
studies.intervention_and_control_group: Intervention: DiGA companion patella (app-based therapy). Control: Conventional analog treatment by physiotherapists.
studies.additional_info_about_trial_arms: Intervention arm: Patients receive an access code for the DiGA companion patella, which provides a 90-day personalized digital exercise therapy with evidence-based exercises and education. Control arm: Patients receive a doctor's prescription for conventional analog treatment by physiotherapists.
studies.collected_data: Numeric Pain Rating Scale (NPRS) for pain reduction and Kujala Score for improvement of knee joint function. Both are measured at 4 time points: day 0, 30, 60, and 90.

audit.dtx_name: companion patella powered by medi - proved by Dt. Kniegesellschaft
audit.study_title: Effects of an app based individual physiotherapy program for anterior knee pain - a prospective multicenter randomized control trial
audit.note: registry-only: outcome measures captured under collected_data; no reported results
